title: A Meta-Analysis and Cohort Study of Histopathologic and Clinical Outcomes in ANCA-Negative versus -Positive Vasculitis.
author: Floyd L Morris AD Elsayed ME Shetty A Baksi A Geetha D Dhaygude A Mitra S
content:
S-EPMC10101608 PMC10101608 A Meta-Analysis and Cohort Study of Histopathologic and Clinical Outcomes in ANCA-Negative versus -Positive Vasculitis.

Background

ANCA-negative pauci-immune glomerulonephritis (PIGN) represents a rare and often under-studied subgroup of the vasculitides. This
